summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 12 features: Student Onboarding Wizard (5-step guided tour), Multi-language support (English/Spanish/Yoruba with i18n), and Marketing About page. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including onboarding wizard steps, language selector, and About page components.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js correctly wraps with I18nProvider and checks onboarding_complete to show wizard
OnboardingWizard.jsx has all 5 steps with proper data-testid attributes (onboarding-step-welcome, interests, courses, cohort, complete)
Interest tags are selectable with data-testid='interest-*' pattern
Navigation buttons (next, back, skip, finish) all have proper data-testid attributes
Progress dots correctly show current step
Sidebar.jsx correctly implements language selector with data-testid='language-selector' and lang-en/es/yo buttons
Language preference persists to backend via PUT /api/auth/me/language
Nav items use labelKey with i18n t() function for translations
AboutPage.jsx is accessible without login (public route at /about)
About page has all required sections: features-grid (12 cards), tiers-section (3 tiers), roles-section, social-strategy
Backend auth.py correctly returns onboarding_complete, language, interests, subscription_tier in GET /api/auth/me
PUT /api/auth/me/onboarding saves interests and sets onboarding_complete=true
PUT /api/auth/me/language validates language (en/es/yo) and rejects invalid values with 400

test_credentials.test_users_created: ITER12_TEST_ prefixed users for backend tests, UI_TEST_ prefixed users for frontend tests (all cleaned up)

seed_data_creation: Test users with onboarding_complete=false created for onboarding wizard testing, test users with onboarding_complete=true created for sidebar/language testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested new features: (1) Student Onboarding Wizard - 5-step guided tour (welcome, interests, courses, cohort, complete) that appears for users with onboarding_complete=false. PUT /api/auth/me/onboarding saves interests and sets onboarding_complete=true. (2) Multi-language support - I18nProvider context with en/es/yo translations. Language selector in sidebar with data-testid='language-selector' and lang-en/es/yo buttons. PUT /api/auth/me/language saves preference. Nav labels use i18n keys (data-testid='nav-dashboard' etc). (3) Marketing About page - Public route at /about with features-grid (12 cards), tiers-section (3 tiers), roles-section, social-strategy. Accessible without login. (4) Backend - GET /api/auth/me returns onboarding_complete, language, interests, subscription_tier. PUT /api/auth/me/onboarding and PUT /api/auth/me/language endpoints working. (5) Regression - GET /api/analytics/enrollment-trends and GET /api/session-records still working.
